title: Add Jarvis AI to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Jarvis AI](https://jarvis-7-5.github.io/) to bots
- Use Jarvis AI as a full working AI assistant powered by pollinations. It provides assistant responses through pollinations.

Fixes #10572

gist.headline: Jarvis joins the hive
gist.blurb: A brand new AI assistant powered by Pollinations just landed in the Greenhouse. Say hello to Jarvis AI!
gist.summary: Added Jarvis AI, a full-featured AI assistant powered by Pollinations, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with Jarvis AI directly from the community Greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an AI assistant named 'Jarvis' to the community greenhouse. Jarvis evokes a high-tech AI butler, but we need to keep it cozy and 8-bit. Depict the Pollinations bee (Polly) welcoming a sleek but cute pixel-art robot butler into a lush, green digital greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bowtie, welcoming a dapper, friendly robot butler into a lush digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bowtie, welcoming a dapper, friendly robot butler into a lush digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants.
